name: Cuba Libre
description: A classic highball that combines BACARDÍ Carta Oro rum, cola, and lime juice over ice. The Cuba Libre perfectly captures the independent spirit of BACARDÍ. Finish with a lime wedge and drink a toast to freedom.
recipe_steps: Fill a highball glass with cubed ice, and squeeze in the lime wedges.
Pour in the BACARDÍ Carta Oro Rum followed by chilled cola.
Give it all a gentle stir.
searchable_text: Cuba Libre main rum BACARDÍ Carta Oro rum A classic highball that combines BACARDÍ Carta Oro rum, cola, and lime juice over ice. The Cuba Libre perfectly captures the independent spirit of BACARDÍ. Finish with a lime wedge and drink a toast to freedom. ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Carta Oro rum, 100 ml cola, 2 lime wedges, as garnish lime wedge recipe steps Fill a highball glass with cubed ice, and squeeze in the lime wedges. Pour in the BACARDÍ Carta Oro Rum followed by chilled cola. Give it all a gentle stir. Garnish with a lime wedge.
